items.title: Music Videos Created with Generative AI - March 20, 2026
items.description:
Music Videos with Generative AI
Presented by Ilya Kipnis

Connect with Ilya:
LinkedIn | GitHub
https://quantstrattrader.wordpress.com

---

THE ORIGINATOR: SKYEBROWS

A British professional CG artist since 2010, SKYEBROWS is a visual editor and one of the best early adopters of AI for music video creation. As a reminder of how fast things are moving — the infamous Will Smith eating spaghetti video was only two years ago.

His breakout video, "Breathing Elon's Musk," was made with Grok Imagine. A comic-style, fluid animation set to music, it surpassed one million views. According to one reaction video, a comparable production using traditional methods would have cost over $100,000.

Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wWZYP5jn5w4

---

ANOTHER CREATOR: LEAFLIT (MITSUHA)

Leaflit is a VTuber (Virtual YouTuber — a streamer who uses an anime character avatar), game designer, entrepreneur, and GenAI video creator.

Her work includes:

ICE Anime Trailer — an anime-style trailer built around a satirical premise about a girl joining ICE.
Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tQBpJCFLxL4

Put Them in the Box — an anime music video about internet extremists.
Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1et1WEvJITY

Deportation — a music video in the style of 90s boy bands (think NSYNC).
Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U31NSPIqmBQ

---

THE SKYEBROWS CINEMATIC UNIVERSE

Skyebrows has inspired a wave of new creators. Brand new YouTube channels (under 1,000 subscribers) are already producing work in his style.

Example — Neon Knights (True Defenders): an 80s/90s cyberpunk anime-style video.
Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ki1MmLZ6C_k

---

THE TAKEAWAY

GenAI is evolving at a remarkable pace, and the cost savings potential is enormous. It may spark a renaissance of animation styles that were previously lost to time and economics. GenAI allows creators to combine fluid animation with tuned vocals in ways that were never before accessible.

A standout example is a collaboration between Skyebrows and his mother, who provided vocals:
Watch: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m8dMy5_Lox4

People can make music videos right now. Leaflit has suggested it may be possible to create full anime episodes before the year is out. Traditional anime costs $3-4 million for 10 episodes — GenAI could cut that by an order of magnitude.

The sky's the limit.

items.title: The First-Ever Live Performance with an AI Singing Voice Clone | ElevenLabs Impact
items.description:
Patrick Darling, a musician who lost his voice to ALS performs an original song live on stage using an AI singing voice clone, in the first performance of its kind ever.

Watch more from the Summit: https://elevenlabs.io/events/elevenlabs-summit/ldn-26

Gabi Leibowitz, who leads the Impact Program at ElevenLabs, introduces the company's initiative to provide free voice cloning technology to individuals who have permanently lost their voice due to conditions like ALS, head and neck cancer, stroke, and multiple sclerosis. She shares that ElevenLabs has committed to giving back one million free voices, has supported over 450 nonprofits, and empowered over 7,000 free voice clones to date.

The emotional highlight is a live performance by Patrick Darling, a musician diagnosed with motor neuron disease (ALS) at age 29 who lost his ability to sing and play instruments. Using an ElevenLabs singing voice clone, built from low-quality phone recordings of pub gigs and kitchen sessions, Patrick performs an original song live on stage for the first time, accompanied by his former bandmates Nick Cocking and Hari Ma. It marks the first time an individual with ALS has performed a live song using a personalized AI singing voice clone, and the reaction from his bandmates, hearing Patrick's voice again after two years, is genuinely moving.

Join the Community
• Discord – https://discord.gg/hPE7yT33Qc
• Reddit – https://www.reddit.com/r/ElevenLabs/

Links & Resources
• ElevenLabs – https://elevenlabs.io/
• Docs & API – https://elevenlabs.io/docs/
• Blog – https://elevenlabs.io/blog/

Connect with ElevenLabs
• Subscribe – https://www.youtube.com/@elevenlabsio?sub_confirmation=1
• Instagram – https://www.instagram.com/elevenlabsio
• TikTok – https://www.tiktok.com/@elevenlabs
• X – https://x.com/elevenlabsio

About ElevenLabs
ElevenLabs is the leading AI voice platform for ultra-realistic, context-aware speech generation. Creators, developers, and enterprises use our tools to design voices, dub content, and build expressive AI video and audio workflows.

items.title: The Little Drummer Boy | A Cinematic Christmas Story (Official Audio)
items.description:
🎅 STREAM THE FULL ALBUM "JINGLE THIS!" here:
https://open.spotify.com/album/2z1OlrVMERbMJkGM4qwb1y

... and ALL major streaming services!

===

Experience the "Little Drummer Boy" like never before. In this cinematic cover, we journey through the silent, holy night to the humble manger, where a young boy offers the only gift he has—his music. 🥁✨

This video features a unique silhouette-style animation, designed to capture the reverence and heart-warming wonder of the first Christmas. Backlit by the glow of the Star of Bethlehem, the silhouettes allow the viewer to step into the shoes of the drummer boy, feeling the power of a humble offering made with total devotion.

Whether you are looking for the best Christmas music for 2025, a peaceful holiday atmosphere, or a powerful orchestral version of your favorite traditional carols, this "Little Drummer Boy" cover is designed to bring peace and joy to your home.

🔔 Subscribe for more cinematic Christmas music and holiday storytelling.
👍 Like this video if it brought a moment of peace to your day.
💬 Comment Below: What does the story of the Little Drummer Boy mean to you?

How you look to me, hm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya
But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, oh
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

[Chorus]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Post-Chorus]
I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

items.title: Doing Data Analysis on Sensitive Data (ft. Oblivious)
items.description:
🏆 Check out Antigranular competition & win cash prizes up to €5,500  👉 https://www.antigranular.com/competitions
📔 Sample notebook working with sensitive private data 👉 https://shorturl.at/yKX89

🌟 Master Python and Build Awesome AI Projects 👉 https://python-course-earlybird.framer.website/?&utm_source=sensdata
Receive top data science/ AI insights in your inbox 👉 https://thu-vu.ck.page/49c5ee08f6

Hi everyone, in today's video we'll be talking about working with private and sensitive data. A lot of times data scientists do not work on the most valuable and "cool" datasets, simply because these datasets contain too sensitive individual information. I have encountered this many times at my work, and it's frustrating! In this video, I will give you a brief introduction to different techniques for handling senstive data, and how to implement them using Antigranular platform. 

Thank you for watching! 😇

6:51 - Sample notebook walkthrough
7:49 - What is Secure Enclave?
8:34 - Sample notebook walkthrough (cont.)

items.title: Doing Data Analysis on Sensitive Data (ft. Oblivious)
items.description:
🏆 Check out Antigranular competition & win cash prizes up to €5,500  👉 https://www.antigranular.com/competitions
📔 Sample notebook working with sensitive private data 👉 https://shorturl.at/yKX89

🌟 Master Python and Build Awesome AI Projects 👉 https://python-course-earlybird.framer.website/?&utm_source=sensdata
Receive top data science/ AI insights in your inbox 👉 https://thu-vu.ck.page/49c5ee08f6

Hi everyone, in today's video we'll be talking about working with private and sensitive data. A lot of times data scientists do not work on the most valuable and "cool" datasets, simply because these datasets contain too sensitive individual information. I have encountered this many times at my work, and it's frustrating! In this video, I will give you a brief introduction to different techniques for handling senstive data, and how to implement them using Antigranular platform. 

Thank you for watching! 😇

🔑 TIMESTAMPS
